div.p: System Invariant: All writes must serialize through Node A. Consistency Model: Eventual Consistency for Read-Only Replicas. Replication Mode: Asynchronous Binlog Streaming.

ul.li: Primary (Node A): The only node allowing INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE.
Secondary (B/C): Replicas that pull changes via binary log offsets.
Async Replication: Primary does not wait for replicas to ACK before returning to client.
LSN (Log Sequence Number): Unique identifier for the position in the transaction stream.

p.em: Note: High replication lag (> 1s) triggers automatic alerts to SRE on-call.
